_meta.name: OECD Development Assistance Committee member countries
_meta.purpose: When the dashboard compares one country's philanthropy to its 'peers', the peer group is the OECD-DAC member countries. This is the natural comparator group used in OECD peer reviews.
_meta.source: OECD Development Assistance Committee, member list as of 2024
_meta.captured_method: hard-coded; this list changes only when a new country joins (Lithuania joined as the 32nd member in 2024)

United Kingdom: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
